cc:Work.dc:title: Angry Teacher and Boy
cc:Work.dc:description: This scene is so mysterious. I suppose the teacher caught the boy passing notes in class and she threatened to whack him with her ruler if he didn't read the note. But the note is a letter of his undying desire to ravish the teacher and steal her purity. The teacher surprised beyond words gasps and clenches her hand to her face, the boy, embarrassed in front of his whole class, begins to sweat uncontrollably.
